params.SpellDescription: Add one mana of any color. If you control a Planet with twelve or more charge counters on it, add three mana of any one color instead.

remaining_params.SpellDescription: Add one mana of any color. If you control a Planet with twelve or more charge counters on it, add three mana of any one color instead.

params.TriggerDescription: When this creature enters, you may sacrifice a land. If you do, draft a card from the Planets spellbook and put it onto the battlefield tapped.
